turns.content: BROOO ok I gotta tell someone cause im literally freakin out right now
Ha, alright I'm listening — what's going on?
so you know the bruins made the playoffs right which like obviously they did but still its always a relief when its official
Yeah, making the playoffs is never guaranteed no matter how good the regular season looks. So what's got you this hyped about it?
dude my boy sully came through so clutch. his uncle has season tickets and he hooked us up with tickets for april 20 bro PLAYOFF HOCKEY at the garden im gonna lose my mind
That's awesome. Playoff hockey at TD Garden is a completely different atmosphere from the regular season. The energy in that building is going to be unreal. How many of you are going?
me sully danny and big mike so four of us. and were doin the whole thing like tailgatin before hand at the bars on causeway street the whole nine yards kid
Causeway Street before a playoff game is going to be electric. Four guys deep, that's a solid crew for it. Do you know who the Bruins are matched up against yet, or is seeding still being sorted out?

not 100 percent sure yet but it might be toronto and honestly bro if its the leafs thats even better cause those fans travel and theres nothin better than watchin the bruins destroy toronto in their own building while leafs fans cry
A Bruins-Leafs playoff series would be incredible for the atmosphere. That rivalry brings out the best in both fanbases. The trash talk alone would be worth the price of admission.

no cap bro I been waitin for this all season. like regular season games are fun dont get me wrong but playoff hockey is a whole different animal. the hits are harder the crowd is louder everythin is just turned up to like 11

Playoff hockey really is the best version of the sport. Everything is more intense — the physicality, the urgency, the crowd. You can feel the energy shift as soon as the puck drops. Have you been to a playoff game before, or is this the first time?

I went once when I was like 14 with my dad it was against montreal and marchand scored in OT bro I will never forget that as long as I live the place went absolutely insane. this is my first time goin as an adult though with my boys so its gonna be different

Going as a kid with your dad versus going as an adult with your crew are two completely different experiences, both great in their own way. You're going to have a blast. That Marchand OT goal must have been an incredible moment to witness live.
dude it was life changin honestly lol. ok im gonna go watch highlights to get even more hyped. april 20 cant come fast enough bro lets gooo
Enjoy the hype train. April 20 is going to be a great time. Soak it all in.
